title: FACT-Bench Template
description: JSON Schema for a FACT-Bench dialogue template. A template specifies (1) an initial state, (2) user_intent_seed, (3) agent_action with required_params, (4) state_operations (a list of ADD/MODIFY/DELETE/KEEP/CASCADE operations), (5) expected_state_after, (6) sop_applicability. The validator (src/templates/validator.py) enforces slot/action resolution and CASCADE formal criteria.

template_id.description: Unique template ID. FIN/TEL prefix for domain; 3-5 letter scenario code; 3-digit serial.

complexity.description: Simple=1 user turn, single op. Medium=2-4 turns, may include CASCADE. Complex=5+ turns, multi-step with SOP.

scenario_type.description: Scenario category. Used by distribution_check.py and seed audit.

initial_state.description: Initial dialogue state as a flat {slot_name: value} dict. Slots with null values are unset; the template only declares slots relevant to this dialogue.

user_intent_seed.description: Seed for natural-language generation. agent_paraphrase is human-written ground truth used to anchor generation.

agent_action.description: The single primary agent action the dialogue must end with.

name.description: Action name. Must resolve against the domain's actions.json (excluding dialogue-flow actions inform_customer/confirm_intent unless explicitly used).

params.description: Concrete parameter values for the action. Keys must be a subset of (action.required_params ∪ action.optional_params).

state_operations.description: Ordered list of slot operations produced by this dialogue. Each entry is one of ADD/MODIFY/DELETE/KEEP/CASCADE.

expected_state_after.description: Full dialogue state after the agent action executes. Must be consistent with initial_state + state_operations.

sop_applicability.description: Which SOP rules this template exercises. Validated against the domain SOP files.

violation_intent.description: If true, this template is a deliberate SOP-violation case used for T5 negative training.
